message:
feat(ui): add DCG frontend dashboard with comprehensive controls

Implements the DCG (Destructive Command Guard) frontend dashboard:

- Add DCG route and navigation item
- Create useDCG hooks for all DCG API endpoints:
  - Status, stats, blocks, pending exceptions
  - Packs configuration, allowlist management
  - Command test/explain mutations
- Build complete DCG page with tabbed interface:
  - Live feed of blocked commands with filtering
  - Pending exceptions approval/deny workflow
  - Statistics visualization by severity and pack
  - Pack configuration enable/disable controls
  - Allowlist management with add/remove
  - Command tester with explain functionality
- All components follow existing design patterns
- Mock data support for development without backend

Closes: flywheel_gateway-52o

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
